name: bangumi-sync
description: Obsidian plugin to sync Bangumi collections

scripts.build:all: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production v1 && node esbuild.config.mjs production v2 && node esbuild.config.mjs production v3
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: threeyang
